name: Nginx
description: 高性能 Web 服务器
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  nginx:
    image: nginx:latest
    container_name: nginx
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./html:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - web

name: MySQL
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: mysql
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: root123
      MYSQL_DATABASE: app
      MYSQL_USER: app
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: app123
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
    ports:
      - "3306:3306"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - db

volumes:
  mysql_data:

networks:
  db:

name: Redis
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis
    command: redis-server --requirepass redis123
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - cache

volumes:
  redis_data:

networks:
  cache:

name: PostgreSQL
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres123
      POSTGRES_DB: app
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - db

volumes:
  postgres_data:

networks:
  db:

name: MariaDB
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  mariadb:
    image: mariadb:10.11
    container_name: mariadb
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: mariadb123
      MYSQL_DATABASE: app
      MYSQL_USER: app
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: app123
    volumes:
      - mariadb_data:/var/lib/mysql
    ports:
      - "3307:3306"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - db

volumes:
  mariadb_data:

networks:
  db:

name: MinIO
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  minio:
    image: minio/minio:latest
    container_name: minio
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin123
    volumes:
      - minio_data:/data
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
      - "9001:9001"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - storage

volumes:
  minio_data:

networks:
  storage:

name: GitLab
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  gitlab:
    image: gitlab/gitlab-ce:latest
    container_name: gitlab
    hostname: gitlab.example.com
    environment:
      GITLAB_OMNIBUS_CONFIG: |
        external_url 'http://gitlab.example.com'
        gitlab_rails['gitlab_shell_ssh_port'] = 2222
    volumes:
      - gitlab_config:/etc/gitlab
      - gitlab_logs:/var/log/gitlab
      - gitlab_data:/var/opt/gitlab
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "2222:22"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - dev

volumes:
  gitlab_config:
  gitlab_logs:
  gitlab_data:

networks:
  dev:

name: Jenkins
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  jenkins:
    image: jenkins/jenkins:lts
    container_name: jenkins
    user: root
    volumes:
      - jenkins_home:/var/jenkins_home
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
      - "50000:50000"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - ci

volumes:
  jenkins_home:

networks:
  ci:

name: Portainer
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:latest
    container_name: portainer
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - portainer_data:/data
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - mgmt

volumes:
  portainer_data:

networks:
  mgmt:

name: Docker Registry
content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  registry:
    image: registry:2
    container_name: registry
    environment:
      REGISTRY_AUTH: htpasswd
      REGISTRY_AUTH_HTPASSWD_REALM: "Registry Realm"
      REGISTRY_AUTH_HTPASSWD_PATH: /auth/htpasswd
    volumes:
      - registry_data:/var/lib/registry
      - ./auth:/auth
    ports:
      - "5000:5000"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - reg

volumes:
  registry_data:

networks:
  reg:
